id.description: The unique identifier of the Azure AD group.

mail_nickname.description: The mail nickname of the Azure AD group, used for email purposes.

object_id.description: The object ID of the Azure AD group, serving as a unique identifier within Azure AD.

onpremises_domain_name.description: The on-premises domain name associated with the Azure AD group, if synced from an on-premises directory.

onpremises_netbios_name.description: The NetBIOS name of the on-premises domain for the Azure AD group, if applicable.

onpremises_sam_account_name.description: The Security Accounts Manager (SAM) account name of the Azure AD group, used for compatibility with older systems.

onpremises_security_identifier.description: The security identifier (SID) of the Azure AD group in an on-premises directory.
